title: Support elaboration-time printing of unpacked array with ‘%p’

features.name: unpacked array printed with %p in $fatal during elaboration
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array printed with %p format specifier in a $fatal system task called from a function during elaboration-time (via localparam assignment)

features.name: unpacked array with %p in $display during elaboration
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array printed with %p format specifier in a $display system task called from a function during elaboration-time
